sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_polygons (id UInt32, shape Array(Nullable(Nested(Point Float64, Float64))), perimeter Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_polygons SET perimeter = polygonPerimeterSpherical(shape) WHERE id <> 1;
SELECT id, perimeter, shape FROM test_polygons WHERE perimeter <> (SELECT MAX(perimeter) FROM test_polygons);
SELECT id, perimeter, shape FROM test_polygons WHERE shape[1] <> (SELECT shape[1] FROM test_polygons WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id, shape, round(perimeter) AS rounded_perimeter FROM test_polygons WHERE rounded_perimeter <> (SELECT AVG(round(perimeter)) FROM test_polygons);
SELECT id, polygonPerimeterSpherical(shape) AS perimeter FROM test_polygons GROUP BY id HAVING perimeter <> 0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_results AS SELECT id, polygonPerimeterSpherical(shape) AS calculated_perimeter FROM test_polygons WHERE id <> (SELECT id FROM test_polygons WHERE shape[1] IS NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_polygons WHERE perimeter <> (SELECT SUM(calculated_perimeter) FROM temp_results) AND shape[1] IS NOT NULL;
